name: @para/bun-types
description: TypeScript ambient declarations for ParaBun's `parabun:*` runtime modules (assistant, audio, camera, csv, gpio, gpu, i2c, image, llm, speech, spi, video, vision). Install alongside `bun-types` (or omit entirely if you don't need upstream Bun types) — this package only declares the parabun:* surface.
